productDisplayName: Vans Men Chukka Low Navy Blue Casual Shoes
description: Chunky casual lace-up shoe from vans. The world-wide favourite brand for skaters and the stylish just keeps on coming up with the goods. As expected from Vans this shoe is superbly crafted for comfort and strength to excellent quality standards. Tones of blue and grey contrast with the dark red sole while denim fabric gives a subtle urban edge – wear this shoe with your jeans, shorts or any casual trousers... but no socks. Upper Leather suede and denim uppers for durability and comfort Padded collar and tongue for extra comfort Lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Lasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toes Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
